paragraphs.text: Maroondah BMX Club — the Eastfield Eagles — was founded in 1980 at Norton Park, Croydon, and moved to its current home on Colchester Road, Kilsyth, in 1991.

We've produced top-8 Australian and Victorian riders, sent kids as young as 9 to the World Championships, had riders compete at the Olympics and reopened in January 2025 with a brand new Pro Gate and a transformed track.
Run by members. Built for riders. Open to everyone.
